creator: davidh@wr.com.au
text:
Should this go here? When I installed this snapshot of FreeBSD, I tried
to install XFree86. Everytime I started the server however it put my
monitor into powerdown mode. I would then have to reboot the machine 
from a network login.

I have 2 Matrox Millenium cards in my machine, although I was expecting
the second one to be ignored. I shall also report this to the XFree86
group.

Fix: 

Not known. I downloaded the 3.3.1 XF86_SVGA server and that worked fine 
with the same configuration file as I had tried previously.
How-To-Repeat: Start the XF86_SVGA server from 3.3.2 of XFree86. Wait 1 second.
